## 🏷️ Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New skill (adds a new skill to the arsenal)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation (updates to docs, README, or examples)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor (code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature)
- [ ] 🧪 Tests (adding evaluation/benchmark test cases)

## ✅ Checklist

- [ ] My skill follows the [Progressive Disclosure Architecture](ARCHITECTURE.md)
- [ ] `SKILL.md` is under 500 lines
- [ ] YAML frontmatter has clear trigger definitions
- [ ] No hardcoded API keys or secrets
- [ ] Tested with at least 3 different prompts
- [ ] I've updated the README if adding a new skill
- [ ] My code follows the existing style/conventions
